subject: business reviews in europe end of 1st quarter, 2002

emails.subject: BUSINESS REVIEWS IN EUROPE END OF 1ST QUARTER, 2002
emails.subject_base: BUSINESS REVIEWS IN EUROPE END OF 1ST QUARTER, 2002
emails.body: BUSINESS REVIEWS IN EUROPE END OF 1ST QUARTER, 2002 Good morning, Tracy! Stan wants us to look at the week of May 6, 2002, to travel to Europe and meet with Colin's team(s) and Adam's team(s). See if we can hit all the necessary sites within that one week time span. I'll await to hear back from you. Thanks! Cindy Stark Executive Assistant to Stan Horton Tel: 713/853-6197 Fax: 713/345-7047 Cindy.Stark@enron.com

emails.subject: FW: FW: BUSINESS REVIEWS IN EUROPE END OF 1ST QUARTER, 2002
emails.subject_base: BUSINESS REVIEWS IN EUROPE END OF 1ST QUARTER, 2002
emails.body: FW: FW: BUSINESS REVIEWS IN EUROPE END OF 1ST QUARTER, 2002 Do you want to coordinate with Lisa?

emails.subject: RE: FW: BUSINESS REVIEWS IN EUROPE END OF 1ST QUARTER, 2002
emails.subject_base: BUSINESS REVIEWS IN EUROPE END OF 1ST QUARTER, 2002
emails.body: RE: FW: BUSINESS REVIEWS IN EUROPE END OF 1ST QUARTER, 2002 Absolutely! I'll take care of it and keep you posted. Do you know who else will be going on this trip with you and Stan? Rod? Tod?

emails.subject: RE: FW: BUSINESS REVIEWS IN EUROPE END OF 1ST QUARTER, 2002
emails.subject_base: BUSINESS REVIEWS IN EUROPE END OF 1ST QUARTER, 2002
emails.body: Stan only mentioned Rod and myself. You might ask him before I ask anyone else. Thanks
